title: Counting two-three-four
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, crowd, identical sibling, second sister, additional girl, dog, puppy, two saras, two evas, third child
prompt: Wide two-shot at the @DiningRoom table from the side, plate of pancakes in middle. @Sara on the LEFT side pointing with a fork: "Two. Three. Four." @Eva on the RIGHT side clapping: "Two! Three! Four!"
